summary: Test suite is significantly incomplete. Unit tests for bumper.ts module are adequate, but cli.ts (the actual CLI script) is entirely untested—no argument parsing, error handling, or file I/O tests exist. Workflow integration tests cover only 4 scenarios and verify output strings but not file mutations or error paths. Test code references fixture files (fixtures/*/version.txt, commits.txt) and supporting files (.github/workflows/semantic-version-bumper.yml, .actrc) that are not provided, making tests dependent on missing setup. The task requires 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' and 'Do NOT test your script directly,' but bumper.test.ts runs directly via bun test without act. Missing: dedicated CLI tests (should exist as tests/cli.test.ts), fixture definitions and creation, comprehensive error scenarios, edge cases (empty commits, boundary versions, BREAKING CHANGE variants), and integration of CLI behavior under real file I/O conditions. The test suite would not reliably catch regressions in CLI argument parsing, error handling, or file management.
